nodes.label: Product One-Sentence (Fonte de Verdade)
nodes.rationale: The canonical sentence — Brazilian A2-B1 self-study learners turning real English and their own mistakes into daily native-audio review on Mac — is the source of truth for README, onboarding, landing copy, release notes, and roadmap.

nodes.label: W5 Decision Record
nodes.rationale: Machine-written block (yarn w5:score) recording all 7 gate outcomes, primary route, billing route, and launch segment. Currently pending with 0/10 rows scored; the roadmap is subordinate to this evidence before launch.

nodes.label: Central Identity Decision (Local-First Tutor, Depth Hidden)
nodes.rationale: PhraseLoop looked like both a consumer app and a power-user tool: strong value sat behind AI config, Ollama, API keys, and Anki export while the UX promise pointed at a beginner. v1 decision: local-first PT→EN tutor, beginner path works with zero setup, advanced tools exist as depth, not as the front door.

nodes.label: Competitive Positioning (The Step Before Anki)
nodes.rationale: Not trying to beat Anki as a repetition engine — winning the step before it: find, extract, clean, add audio, review, reuse errors. Measurable promise: real clip/article to a reviewed native-audio card in under 2 minutes with less friction than Anki/Migaku/LingQ. Speak/ELSA are stronger on pronunciation.

nodes.label: Applied Research Principles (Flow, ZDP, Challenge Point, Desirable Difficulties)
nodes.rationale: Flow (challenge/skill balance), ZDP (slightly beyond solo ability with temporary scaffold), Challenge Point (functional difficulty depends on user and moment), desirable difficulties, performance ≠ learning, spacing/retrieval as the spine, selective interleaving. Translation: FSRS + active recall central, latency/hint/fatigue capture, opt-in removable scaffold, cooldown sessions, gated adaptive difficulty, no XP/leagues/aggressive notifications.

nodes.label: Adaptive Cycle Shipped Infrastructure
nodes.rationale: Review telemetry (ReviewRecord latency/hint/scaffold), honest end screen (SessionSummary separates accuracy now vs predicted stability), Study scaffold, light session/cooldown (sessionMode.ts), per-skill state (skillState.ts), cycle picker (cyclePlanner.ts), gated difficulty band (band.ts/bandQueue.ts only reorders when the gate says adopt). D+1/D+7 validation still pending.

nodes.label: Activation Event Model (product.md)
nodes.rationale: Minimum events first_run_started through day_7_returned; derived metrics activation, ttfr, and dropoff_step (clip | save_phrase | review | mistake | correction | own_source).
